description: Marketing event pages with session naming + schema file - correctly classified as single UI domain
rationale: After tightening session/schema to segment-based matching: stripe-sessions-contest.tsx no longer matches auth (sessions is not a path segment). schemas.ts no longer matches database (schemas is not a path segment). All .tsx files = ui domain. Single domain = PASS.
notes: Previously a false positive (3 domains due to loose substring matching). Now correctly classified. Tree-sitter could further distinguish marketing vs UI if needed.
